THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EL GOHARY, MOHAMED & DOING BUSINESS AS SPORTS TECHALSO KNOWN AS FTC SPORTS $13,306.77 PRINCIPAL, $1,675.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,161.92 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, $500.00 SANCTIONS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,763.69, $500 SANCTIONS AWARDED ON 5/8/98; THIS JUDGMENT BY ORDER OF THE COURT IS ENTERED EFFECTIVE 5/7/98.
